## Summary

- Describe the change.
- Affected areas: Web / Control API / Runtime / SDK / deployment / docs / other.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `python3 -m pytest apps/agent-runtime/tests`
- [ ] Production template or migration checks, if affected
- [ ] Documentation updated, if needed

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused enough for review
- [ ] Tests or reproduction notes cover the changed behavior
- [ ] Security-sensitive impacts are called out
- [ ] Release notes or migration notes are included, if needed

## Risk Notes

- Note deployment, migration, security, or compatibility risks.
